dsl_rule.translation_notes: Mean-reversion signal using Bollinger Bands on GLD-USO pair. Entry conditions trigger on price touching BB bands (oversold/overbought extremes). Exit conditions trigger on mean reversion (price returning to BB middle/SMA). Position scaling not explicitly modeled in rule conditions but implied by entry logic. MEAN_REVERTING regime inferred from signal intent; note this is not in standard ALLOWED_REGIMES but semantically matches the signal category.

backtest_rule.reason: Mean-reversion signal using Bollinger Bands on GLD-USO pair. Entry conditions trigger on price touching BB bands (oversold/overbought extremes). MEAN_REVERTING regime inferred from signal intent; note this is not in standard ALLOWED_REGIMES but semantically matches the signal category.

source_rule_text: Trade mean-reverting pairs (GLD-USO) using Bollinger Bands to generate long and short signals with position scaling.
